response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned, versatile engineer with nearly two decades of experience, genuine high-scale systems work (microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), and current hands-on AI tooling experience. However, this role's core domain — experimentation platforms, telemetry foundations, feature flighting, statistical analysis, and growth measurement — is essentially absent from his background. His trajectory is that of a strong senior/staff generalist at small-to-mid-size companies, with no evidence of the multi-workstream, cross-organization platform leadership expected at Principal/IC6, so the fit for this specific position is weak despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience (15+ years) across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency backend systems, meeting the language and tenure requirements
Real production-scale experience: data integration microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second with async I/O and caching
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, plus strong testing/quality culture (TDD, test frameworks, workshops)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation systems, A/B testing, feature flagging, metrics/guardrail design, or statistical analysis — the heart of this role
No evidence of Principal/IC6-scope leadership: leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives or building platforms adopted across an enterprise
Career centered on product feature work and generalist roles at smaller companies rather than growth, measurement, or platform engineering

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Principal/IC6 platform-leadership scope
Strong fundamentals and high-scale distributed systems background
